title: [codereview-2] pass 3: T-Deck gateway conf update complete - no P0/P1/P2 findings after 3 passes. Matches Heltec pattern for WiFi+gateway. Update to defconfig MAIN_STACK_SIZE if needed in follow-up.
description: Final pass: edge cases, build impact, consistency. Config change is additive and guarded. T-Deck now has identical critical overrides as Heltec for gateway use. No findings. Ready for build verification and close after 3 clean passes.
